mapper.select: SELECT E1.EMPNO, E1.ENAME, E1.JOB, E2.ENAME AS SASU, S.GRADE, D.DNAME FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP(EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, DEPTNO, SAL) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{eName}, #{job}, #{mgr}, #{deptno}, #{sal})
